features.evidence: 2 storage shield and lift up the wireless lan and wireless w cards are both removable the 56w batteries can also be replaced this review model has a 14in wxga 1920x1200 ips antic clair matte display panel color accuracy is 45 ntsc fine for office or uni work look at the wqxga 256x 1600 model with 100 srgb if you you need to edit the occasional image on adobe photoshop or lightroom the g11 is rated at 300 nits easy to read indoors but difficult to view if you re near a sunny window or outdoors in bright sunlight the viewing angles are excellent thanks to the ips panel tip go for the wxga ips 400nits low power 100 srgb model for the best balance of display quality and battery life on the left we have a hdmi 2

2 storage shield and lift up the wireless lan and wireless w cards are both removable the 56w batteries can also be replaced this review model has a 14in wxga 1920x1200 ips antic clair matte display panel color accuracy is 45 ntsc fine for office or uni work look at the wqxga 256x 1600 model with 100 srgb if you you need to edit the occasional image on adobe photoshop or lightroom the g11 is rated at 300 nits easy to read indoors but difficult to view if you re near a sunny window or outdoors in bright sunlight the viewing angles are excellent thanks to the ips panel tip go for the wxga ips 400nits low power 100 srgb model for the best balance of display quality and battery life on the left we have a hdmi 2 However, if you are not interested in details you can skip to end of video for final conclusions

that chiclet keyboard is an absolute delight considering the laptop s skinny build offering respectable travel and a firm comfortable typing experience you ve got three levels of backlight in here and a glorious spill resistant design as well which is an absolute lifesaver when you re desperately trying to crack through that last bit of work on a friday night with the help from a few shandy s and while there s no touchscreen control here the suspicious trackpad is pleasingly responsive to your swipes and gestures with clickable corners that don t send the cursor skittering across the screen a drunken giraffe an hp has even added one of those funky pointer nipples to the middle of the keyboard for those moments when you need absolute precision complete with their own dedicated mouse buttons now in these rather strange and decidedly crappy times it s also imperative to bag yourself a laptop that s great for zooming skyping microsoft teaming whatever you fancy some more good news then because the elitebook 840 g7 boasts an hd webcam that can clearly capture your mug and while there s no built in lens cover here it is obvious when that camera is in use because of the bright notification light that flashes on alongside it and this laptop also boasts a triple mic setup so it can clearly pick up your voice even with a fair bit of background rumble for the inevitable barrage of online chats and another highlight of this professional laptop is the performance with grunt provided by one of intel s 10th generation core i7 platforms which is built for security as well as a good bit of grunt work and it s backed here in the elitebook by a healthy 16 gigs of ram whether you re working with demanding creative apps or simply not a fan of closing down browser tabs in chrome the elitebook won t soil itself and give up everyday running is perfectly smooth and this machine s integrated graphics can even handle a bit of light gaming on the side as long as you don t expect to run anything hardcore you ve got full intel wi fi 6 support for a strong and stable web connection and hp has also crammed in a nippy 512 gigabyte nvme ssd which in my tests hit rather tasty read speeds over 2

2 storage shield and lift up the wireless lan and wireless w cards are both removable the 56w batteries can also be replaced this review model has a 14in wxga 1920x1200 ips antic clair matte display panel color accuracy is 45 ntsc fine for office or uni work look at the wqxga 256x 1600 model with 100 srgb if you you need to edit the occasional image on adobe photoshop or lightroom the g11 is rated at 300 nits easy to read indoors but difficult to view if you re near a sunny window or outdoors in bright sunlight the viewing angles are excellent thanks to the ips panel tip go for the wxga ips 400nits low power 100 srgb model for the best balance of display quality and battery life on the left we have a hdmi 2

3 wireless combo card wireless connectivity was excellent and reliable throughout testing the same could be said of the bluetooth connection testing with an exter external mouse and speaker was reliable too on certain 840 g11 models there are 4g or 5g options via the sim card slot hp premium keyboard is spill resistant and it s two level backlit keys there s a new ai co pilot shortcut key to bring up microsoft s co pilot feature the f12 customizable key can be programmed to bring up a website app file or open a folder the chicklet keyboard is marvelous to type on i managed to accurately get 75 words per minute touch typing on it nicely spaced out with large keys great tactile travel and fairly quiet when typing away one of the best keyboards alongside the noovo thinkpad t series the clickpad with multi touch gesture support as taps enabled as default they remove the track point and buttons a few years back to accommodate a larger touchpad it has a smooth glass surface for comfortable finger gliding integrated buttons are quied and f premium the hp elitebook 840 g11 features audio by poly studio which includes dual stereo speakers with discrete amplifiers additionally it comes with integrated jeay microphones sound quality is pretty good considering it s two downward firing speakers located underneath the keyboard clear and precise with a warm tone to vocals and even some bass great for spotify background music or catching up with colleagues over teams probably one of the better jewel laptop speakers on the market here are some audio samples the g11 webcam is a 5 megapixel camera with ir sensors great video quality thanks to windows studio effects using the mpu in the core ultra processor even in average indoor office lighting or gray skies outside the video quality is fantastic this review model has an intel core ultra 755 u processor with 12 cores two performance cores from 1 However, hp s elite book range is a popular option for professionals coming in between the more expensive 1000 series but offering more features than the cheaper 600 series new in the g11 are intel core ultra processors with new ai tricks recycled materials and enhanced collaboration with the latest poly technologies is it cut from several row or primar let s find out out of the box that 840 g11 looks familiar to those who have used elite books in the past it retains the same silver corporate look and slim design with rounded corners only broken by the black recycled display bezel the g11 includes a drawable all metal chassis design based on high quality aluminium and magnesium naturally stress tested to military standard 810h starting at 1
if you re a student, casual gamer, or creative on a budget, the hp elite book 840 g5 still delivers good value for its price

2 storage shield and lift up the wireless lan and wireless w cards are both removable the 56w batteries can also be replaced this review model has a 14in wxga 1920x1200 ips antic clair matte display panel color accuracy is 45 ntsc fine for office or uni work look at the wqxga 256x 1600 model with 100 srgb if you you need to edit the occasional image on adobe photoshop or lightroom the g11 is rated at 300 nits easy to read indoors but difficult to view if you re near a sunny window or outdoors in bright sunlight the viewing angles are excellent thanks to the ips panel tip go for the wxga ips 400nits low power 100 srgb model for the best balance of display quality and battery life on the left we have a hdmi 2

1 ghz a total of 14 threads along with 16 gb of ddr5 5600 mhz ram in single channel mode and a 512 gb pcie mvme ssd the g11 will power through most office tasks with ease opening multiple browser tabs outlock email and occasional teams video meeting catchup tip you will get better results with george channel memory rather than single channel on this review model for example add a l stick of 16 gb ddr5 memory for our performance test we set the best performance mode in windows and plug the laptop into the mains during testing here are the benchmarking results for the elite book 840 g11 here s a comparison with the hp elite book 840 g10 the intel core ultra 755 u the intel core ultra 755 u sits around the same as the amd ryzen 7 pro 7730 u and slightly above the amd ryzen 5 5600 h in general benchmarking scores using using the quick cpu tool plugged in balance mode idle cpu temperature is around 63 cel cpu clock speed is around 2 to 3 ghz on the pes and 1
